name: Pizza Bread Appetizers
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw the frozen bread dough.
2. Roll out the dough into three rectangles.
3. Place a layer of Swiss, Provolone, and Mozzarella cheeses on each rectangle, followed by pepperoni slices.
4. Roll up each rectangle tightly.
5. Make 4-5 slashes in the top of each bread roll to allow steam to escape during baking.
6. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. Bake until golden brown, about 20-25 minutes.
8. Slice as you would regular bread.
NOTE: This recipe can be made ahead of time, wrapped tightly in foil, and frozen. Thaw overnight in the refrigerator before baking and slicing.
